name: Kamo Sakamushi (Sake Steamed Duck)
recipeIngredient: 2 each Whole Duck or Chicken Breast
recipeInstructions:
IN ADVANCE:
Place Boned Duck or Chicken breast skin side up on a flameproof dish and sprinkle with 1 scant tablespoon of salt. Cover, refrigerate, and let sit for 3 hours.
TO COOK:
Preheat the grill to its highest point. Meanwhile, pour Sake over the Chicken or Duck and steam for 7 minutes. Remove from steamer, and grill 3 inches from heat for 2 minutes. Cool to room temperature, cut breasts into 1/4-inch slices and serve.
